name: Trello
tagline: Visual project management with boards, lists, and cards
description: Popular kanban-style project management with boards and power-ups
pros: Visual kanban interface usable within 15 minutes
Butler no-code automation for cards and reminders
Free tier with unlimited boards and cards
cons: Advanced features require Standard plan at $6/user/month
No burndown charts or velocity reporting
Power-Up updates slowed after Atlassian acquisition

features.name: Cards
features.description: Tasks with checklists and due dates

content.title: Executive Summary
content.body: Popular kanban-style project management with boards and power-ups Trello earns a 4.2/5 rating from 34,500 user reviews.

content.title: TL;DR
content.body: Trello is a leading project management platform rated 4.2/5 across 34,500 reviews. Pricing starts at Free–$17.50/user/mo. Best for Small Teams and Startups.

content.title: Rating Overview
content.body: Trello scores 4.2/5 overall with features (3.8/5), ease of use (4.7/5), support (3.6/5), value (4.3/5), performance (4.4/5).

content.title: Quick Verdict
content.body: Trello earns a 4.2/5 rating recommended for Small Teams and Startups. Delivers solid functionality with intuitive interface.

content.title: Company Background
content.body: Trello was founded in 2011 in New York, USA, serving 2M+ teams customers with 500+ employees.

content.title: Product Overview
content.body: Trello is a visual project management with boards, lists, and cards. Provides 18 features across Core, Automation, Views, Integrations, Security, Mobile, Analytics, Productivity categories. Mobile on iOS and Android. API available.

content.title: Key Features
content.body: Essential project management features:
items: Cards: Tasks with checklists and due dates.

content.title: Feature Deep Dive
content.body: Boards. Unlimited project boards. Lists. Workflow stage columns. Cards. Tasks with checklists and due dates.

content.title: AI Features
content.body: Trello AI includes AI card suggestions, Butler automation.

content.title: API & Automation
content.body: Trello provides a comprehensive API for custom integration and workflow automation.

content.title: Security
content.body: Trello holds SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, GDPR certifications with TLS 1.2+ and AES-256 encryption.

content.title: Compliance
content.body: Trello complies with GDPR, CCPA, SOC 2 regulations.

content.title: Integrations
content.body: Integrates with Slack, Jira, Confluence, Google Drive, Dropbox, Salesforce, HubSpot, Zapier, and 2+ more.

content.title: Pricing
content.body: Trello uses freemium with per-user premium. Free tier available. Plans from Free–$17.50/user/mo.

content.title: Pros
content.body: Trello advantages:
items: Visual kanban interface usable within 15 minutes
Butler no-code automation for cards and reminders
Free tier with unlimited boards and cards

content.title: Cons
content.body: Considerations:
items: Advanced features require Standard plan at $6/user/month
No burndown charts or velocity reporting
Power-Up updates slowed after Atlassian acquisition

content.title: Performance
content.body: Strong performance with fast load times.

content.title: Ease of Use
content.body: Trello has a low learning curve with intuitive interface.

content.title: User Experience
content.body: Streamlined modern interface.

content.title: Customer Support
content.body: Support rated 3.6/5 via email and knowledge base.

content.title: Industry Fit
content.body: Best for Project Management and Collaboration with Small Teams and Startups teams.

content.title: Team Size Fit
content.body: Trello accommodates teams of all sizes with generous free tier. Best ROI for 5-50 person teams.

content.title: Real Use Cases
content.body: A small teams team uses Trello to streamline project management workflows and improve team productivity.

content.title: Competitor Analysis
content.body: Trello competes with asana, monday-com, jira. Primary differentiators: core functionality and ease of use.

content.title: Alternatives
content.body: Consider asana, monday-com, jira based on specific team requirements.

content.title: Migration Guide
content.body: Migration rated low complexity. Most teams transition within 1-2 weeks. Parallel testing recommended.

content.title: Buying Advice
content.body: Evaluate: feature alignment, total cost at Free–$17.50/user/mo, migration effort (1-2 weeks), and real-data trial.

content.title: Final Verdict
content.body: Trello earns 4.2/5. Solid option for most teams. Recommended for teams prioritizing project management.

faqs.question: What is Trello best used for?
faqs.answer: Trello is best used for popular kanban-style project management with boards and power-ups.

faqs.question: How much does Trello cost?
faqs.answer: Trello uses freemium with per-user premium starting at Free–$17.50/user/mo. Free tier available.

faqs.question: Does Trello integrate with other tools?
faqs.answer: Yes, integrates with Slack, Jira, Confluence, Google Drive, Dropbox. And 5+ more.

faqs.question: Is Trello suitable for small teams?
faqs.answer: Yes, with a generous free tier. Freemium with per-user premium scales with team growth.

faqs.question: How does Trello pricing work?
faqs.answer: Trello uses freemium with per-user premium from Free–$17.50/user/mo, with free tier available.

faqs.question: Is Trello secure?
faqs.answer: Yes, holds SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, GDPR certifications with encryption.

faqs.question: What integrations does Trello offer?
faqs.answer: Integrates with Slack, Jira, Confluence, Google Drive, Dropbox, Salesforce, and more. API available.

faqs.question: Is Trello good for small businesses?
faqs.answer: Yes, with free tier. Freemium with per-user premium scales with business size.

faqs.question: What are Trello's main advantages?
faqs.answer: Visual kanban interface usable within 15 minutes and Butler no-code automation for cards and reminders.

faqs.question: What are Trello's limitations?
faqs.answer: Advanced features require Standard plan at $6/user/month and No burndown charts or velocity reporting.

faqs.question: How does Trello compare to asana?
faqs.answer: Trello differentiates through pricing and usability.

faqs.question: Does Trello support team collaboration?
faqs.answer: Yes, includes collaboration features for team workflows.

faqs.question: Can I customize Trello?
faqs.answer: Yes, via API, custom fields, and templates.

faqs.question: Is Trello easy to set up?
faqs.answer: Yes, most teams start within hours.

faqs.question: How often does Trello update?
faqs.answer: Updates weekly.

faqs.question: What support does Trello provide?
faqs.answer: Support rated 3.6/5. Email and knowledge base.

faqs.question: Does Trello offer a free version?
faqs.answer: Yes, with core features.

faqs.question: How does Trello handle data privacy?
faqs.answer: Complies with GDPR, CCPA, SOC 2 regulations.

faqs.question: What ROI can teams expect?
faqs.answer: Positive ROI typically within 3-6 months from improved project management workflows.

faqs.question: What platforms does Trello support?
faqs.answer: Available on Cloud. Mobile on iOS and Android.
